infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BinaPay needs access to your photo library so you can upload images such as receipts or identity documents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BinaPay needs access to your camera so you can take photos for verification or support.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BinaPay may use your microphone when sending audio messages to support.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: BinaPay needs access to your contacts so you can easily send airtime or services to saved contacts.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your Face ID biometric data to ensure that your personal information and app data remain secure. Using Face ID provides an extra layer of protection, making sure that only you can access your sensitive data.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your contacts. We use this permission to fetch your contacts and select a contact to buy or gift services to.
